title: CYBERCUBE Regulation Compliance Map — schema (STD-GOV-006 crosswalks)
description: Machine-readable contract for per-regulation compliance-map files under governance/compliance-maps/. Each file carries a YAML front-matter block validated by this schema; the body is a human-readable Markdown crosswalk grouped by regulation domain. Validated by tools/validate-schemas.py via the YAML-front-matter extraction path. Non-authoritative: these maps are CYBERCUBE's self-assessment against the regulation text, not a regulator attestation.

id.description: Slug identifier for the regulation. Lowercase with hyphens/dots. Examples: 'pci-dss-4.0', 'hipaa-security-rule', 'soc2'.

effective.description: Date the regulation version became effective.

published_map.description: Date this mapping snapshot is valid as of. Owners review ≥annually; >13 months stale is a lint finding.

owner.description: Named role accountable for keeping this map current. Examples: 'sec-lead', 'privacy-lead + legal-lead'.

authoritative.description: Explicitly false for every map. Maps are CYBERCUBE self-assessment, not a regulator attestation.

ucm_id.description: UCM control ID per [7] STD-GOV-006 §1. Format: CTL-{DOMAIN}-{SEQ}. Examples: CTL-SEC-003, CTL-DAT-015.

regulation_ref.description: Regulation citation (requirement / section / criterion number) in the regulation's own numbering. Free-form string; regulation-specific conventions. Examples: '8.3.6' (PCI), '164.312(a)(2)(i)' (HIPAA), 'CC6.1' (SOC2).

relationship.description: direct = UCM row fully satisfies the regulation requirement (evidence-ready). partial = UCM row contributes; complete compliance requires additional controls named in notes. adjacent = related but not sufficient; auditor context only.

notes.description: Free-text explanation. REQUIRED in practice when relationship is 'partial' (name the additional controls) or 'adjacent' (explain the adjacency).

evidence_artifact.description: Pointer to the evidence artifact (log type, report, registry row) that an auditor would request to verify this mapping. Free-text.
